'''Galliwig's Cantina''' was owned and run by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] known as [[Galliwig]]. The [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] included corner booths, and was known for playing [[Music/Legends|music]] that offended the ears of some of the clientèle. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[free-trader]] [[Loh'khar]] the Finder used the cantina to conduct business transactions in, sitting in the same booth so that his regular customers could find him easily. In the cantina, Loh'khar acquired three [[Turazza]] [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] during a business deal; the eggs hatched into three sisters<ref name="te" /> whom the Twi'lek named [[Rizzal]], [[Vizzal]], and [[Nizzal]].<ref name="tdc">''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Galliwig's cantina appeared in the short text story ''[[Turazza Eggs]]'' by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]], which appeared in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' published by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="te" />
